description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a broad, low-pitched gable roof covered in gray shingles. The structure features a prominent front porch supported by several columns, providing a sheltered entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with multiple rectangular windows distributed along the sides. The front facade includes a main entrance and a small set of steps leading up to the porch. The building sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, and there are a few vertical panels or boards positioned near one side, possibly for decorative or functional purposes. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and open outdoor space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, front porch, and light-colored exterior walls, set on a green lawn. Multiple windows and a sheltered entryway define its simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, main entrance, and several windows along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof and the supporting columns of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and the back wall, with less architectural detail than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side wall with a few windows and the roof's overhang.
